steps.title: Use the style contrast
steps.content: The realist painting emphasizes accuracy and ordinary working people. The romantic style described later stages subjects attractively and accentuates positive traits, so the two styles are being contrasted.

steps.title: Choose the opposing verb
steps.content: A, C, and D would mean realism embodied, copied, or expanded romantic conventions. Those meanings conflict with the contrast between accurate realism and idealizing romanticism. Rejected expresses that opposition. The answer is B.
